test_suite: Stage 9 Stories Backend Final Closure Audit

detailed_results.test: 1. Create TEXT story with background + stickers
2. Create IMAGE story type (validation error expected)
detailed_results.details: Got expected validation error: {'error': 'IMAGE story requires at least one media attachment', 'code': 'VALIDATION_ERROR'}

detailed_results.test: 3. View own story
4. Story rail shows own stories
5. EVERYONE story visible to follower
detailed_results.details: Bob can view Alice's EVERYONE story: 200

detailed_results.test: 6. FOLLOWERS story: follower can see, non-follower blocked
7. CLOSE_FRIENDS story: close friend can see, non-close-friend blocked
8. Mark seen: first view increments viewCount
9. Repeated view: viewCount stays same (idempotent)
10. Emoji reaction: POST /stories/:id/react with valid emoji
11. Change reaction: POST /stories/:id/react with different emoji (upsert)
12. Remove reaction: DELETE /stories/:id/react
13. Reply to story: POST /stories/:id/reply
14. Get replies (owner): GET /stories/:id/replies
15. POLL sticker: respond with optionIndex, get results
16. Duplicate POLL vote: should return 409
17. QUIZ sticker: respond, check correctness in results
18. EMOJI_SLIDER: respond with value 0.85
19. Create highlight with stories
20. Edit highlight: add stories, rename
21. Block user: POST /me/blocks/:userId (should succeed)
22. Blocked user CANNOT view story detail (GET /stories/:id → 403)
23. Blocked user CANNOT react to story (POST /stories/:id/react → 403)
24. Blocked user CANNOT reply to story (POST /stories/:id/reply → 403)
25. Blocked user CANNOT respond to sticker (POST /stories/:id/sticker/:stickerId/respond → 403)
26. Blocked user's story rail does NOT show blocker's stories
detailed_results.details: Charlie sees Bob's stories: False (should be False)

detailed_results.test: 27. Reverse block: if C blocks A, C cannot see A's stories (bidirectional block)
detailed_results.details: Charlie viewing Alice's story after blocking Alice: 403 (expected 403)

detailed_results.test: 28. Unblock: DELETE /me/blocks/:userId, then blocked user CAN view story again
detailed_results.details: Charlie viewing Bob's story after unblock: 200 (expected 200)

detailed_results.test: 29. Block self: POST /me/blocks/<self-id> → 400
30. Block + close friends: blocking removes from close friends, blocked user cannot be added as close friend
detailed_results.details: Bob in CF after block: False, Re-add status: 403

detailed_results.test: 31. Close friends max-500: verify limit exists (add friend succeeded)
32. Highlights max-50: verify limit exists (create highlight succeeded)
33. Counter recompute: POST /admin/stories/:id/recompute-counters
34. Report flow: POST /stories/:id/report + duplicate report → 409
35. Create story response has required fields: id, authorId, type, status, expiresAt, createdAt, stickers
36. Invalid emoji → 400
37. Self-react → 400
38. Self-reply → 400
39. Expired story → 410 (or 404 for non-existent)
40. REMOVED story → 404 (delete a story, then try to view it)
41. Admin stories queue: GET /admin/stories?status=ALL (needs ADMIN role user)
42. Admin analytics: GET /admin/stories/analytics
43. Admin moderate HOLD: story becomes 403 for non-owner
44. Admin moderate APPROVE: story becomes visible again
45. Get default settings: GET /me/story-settings
46. Update settings: PATCH /me/story-settings
47. hideStoryFrom: add userId to hideStoryFrom → that user can't see stories
48. Reply privacy OFF: set replyPrivacy to OFF → reply attempts get rejected
